| Opportunity | Date Added | Impact | Cost | Effort | Score |  |
| Example: Ad set X has a ROAS of 5.5 on IG Feed vs an average ROAS of 2.5 on the adset and could benefit from being in its own ad set with dedicated spend for scaling | 43926 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | in this example, it is a high impact change, with low cost and low effort making it a very high score, therefore a high priority to implement. Use the filters to order your scores, low to high for prioritisation. |
